code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut ok = true
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut cur = 0

  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0 - 1
      end
    else
      0 - 1
    end

    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_sign = b == 45 or b == 43

    if in_num
      if is_digit
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      else
        let val = cur * sign
        if have_prev and val < prev
          ok = false
        end
        prev = val
        have_prev = true
        in_num = false
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        if is_sign
          in_num = true
          sign = if b == 45
            0 - 1
          else
            1
          end
        end
      end
    else
      if is_digit
        in_num = true
        cur = b - 48
      else if is_sign
        in_num = true
        sign = if b == 45
          0 - 1
        else
          1
        end
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if ok
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
